best_prompt: Follow the standard rules of English adjective order: opinion, size, age, shape, color, origin, material, purpose. Given two sentences with adjectives in different orders, identify the one that adheres to this sequence.

features.name: rule_reinforcement
features.description: 1 if the prompt explicitly repeats the adjective order rule in more than one place (e.g., in the initial instruction and again when describing the task), 0 otherwise. This feature causally affects performance because repetition reinforces the rule in the AI's processing, increasing the likelihood of accurate application.

features.name: instruction_clarity
features.description: 1 if the prompt explicitly states that the response should be only the letter (A or B) with no additional text, 0 otherwise. This feature causally affects performance because unambiguous output instructions reduce error-prone deviations and ensure the AI focuses solely on the task, improving accuracy.

features.name: rule_explicitness
features.description: 1 if the prompt explicitly lists the full adjective order sequence (opinion, size, age, shape, color, origin, material, purpose) in the instruction, 0 otherwise. This feature causally affects performance because explicitly stating the full sequence provides a clear reference for the AI to compare against, improving accuracy in identifying the correct order.
